title: JavaScript / React
shortDesc: Modern frontend & backend with React 18 and Node.js ecosystem.
overview: Expert-level proficiency in the JavaScript ecosystem. I build production-grade SPAs with React, scalable REST APIs with Node/Express, and real-time applications with Socket.io.

title: PHP / Laravel
shortDesc: Robust backend APIs and full-stack apps with Laravel framework.
overview: Deep expertise in PHP and the Laravel ecosystem. From RESTful APIs with Sanctum auth to full-stack Livewire apps, I build clean, maintainable Laravel applications following SOLID principles.

title: .NET / C#
shortDesc: Enterprise apps with ASP.NET Core, EF Core, and Azure cloud.
overview: Solid enterprise development skills with ASP.NET Core. I build MVC applications, Minimal APIs, and integrate Azure services. Comfortable with both traditional controller-based and modern Minimal API approaches.

title: Frontend / UI
shortDesc: Pixel-perfect responsive UIs with Tailwind CSS and modern CSS.
overview: Strong eye for design and deep knowledge of modern CSS. I craft pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces using Tailwind CSS and vanilla CSS animations. From dark-mode dashboards to landing pages.

title: DevOps / Tools
shortDesc: Docker, Git, CI/CD pipelines, Linux server management.
overview: Comfortable with the full DevOps workflow: containerizing apps with Docker, version control with Git, setting up CI/CD pipelines, and managing Linux VPS servers. I ship code reliably.
sampleCode:
version: '3.9'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    volumes:
      - .:/var/www/html
    depends_on: [db, redis]

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports: ["80:80","443:443"]
    volumes:
      - ./docker/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

  db:
    image: mysql:8.0
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine

volumes:
  mysql_data:

title: Databases
shortDesc: Relational and NoSQL databases: MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis.
overview: Strong database design and query optimization skills across both relational (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) databases. I design normalized schemas and write efficient complex queries.
sampleCode:
-- Complex JOIN with aggregation
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  COUNT(o.id)          AS total_orders,
  SUM(o.total_amount)  AS lifetime_value,
  MAX(o.created_at)    AS last_order_date
FROM users u
INNER JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
  AND o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
HAVING total_orders >= 3
ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC
LIMIT 100;
